commit_message:
Fix missing logic normalization when using -fno-gate (#6952) Fix missing logic normalization when using -fno-gate (#6952) **The Issue:**
When compiling with `-O0` or `-fno-gate`, module-level var initializations evaluated via ternary operators were evaluating incorrectly as time-zero static initializations rather than continuous assignments.

**Root Cause:**
As noted by @wsnyder in #6952, downstream scheduling relies on V3Gate to normalize these variables. However, src/Verilator.cpp was unco
